testcase.classname: ConnectionManager opens and exchanges messages with metrics updated
testcase.name: ConnectionManager opens and exchanges messages with metrics updated

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager sends pings and updates lastHeartbeatAt / lastMessageAt
testcase.name: ConnectionManager sends pings and updates lastHeartbeatAt / lastMessageAt

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager terminates after idle timeout
testcase.name: ConnectionManager terminates after idle timeout

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager propagates connection errors during connecting
testcase.name: ConnectionManager propagates connection errors during connecting

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager logs unexpected response details when server rejects upgrade
testcase.name: ConnectionManager logs unexpected response details when server rejects upgrade

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager send ignores data when socket already closed
testcase.name: ConnectionManager send ignores data when socket already closed

testcase.classname: ConnectionManager truncates unexpected response body longer than limit
testcase.name: ConnectionManager truncates unexpected response body longer than limit

testcase.classname: resolver ↔ proxy integration establishes transport over proxy and echoes bytes
testcase.name: resolver ↔ proxy integration establishes transport over proxy and echoes bytes

testcase.classname: AegisResolver builds wss URL with /proxy/<wid> and applies TLS options
testcase.name: AegisResolver builds wss URL with /proxy/<wid> and applies TLS options

testcase.classname: AegisResolver adds CA from settings and logs when read fails
testcase.name: AegisResolver adds CA from settings and logs when read fails

testcase.classname: AegisResolver handles diverse proxy url formats
testcase.name: AegisResolver handles diverse proxy url formats

testcase.classname: AegisResolver merges CA sources and sets client cert options
testcase.name: AegisResolver merges CA sources and sets client cert options

testcase.classname: AegisResolver surface error for missing or invalid proxy url
testcase.name: AegisResolver surface error for missing or invalid proxy url

testcase.classname: AegisResolver schedules renewal and triggers forceReconnect
testcase.name: AegisResolver schedules renewal and triggers forceReconnect

testcase.classname: AegisResolver forceReconnect ends active transport once
testcase.name: AegisResolver forceReconnect ends active transport once

testcase.classname: auth module initializeAuth registers provider exactly once
testcase.name: auth module initializeAuth registers provider exactly once

testcase.classname: auth module requireSession creates session, stores secrets, and emits change
testcase.name: auth module requireSession creates session, stores secrets, and emits change

testcase.classname: auth module signOut clears stored secrets and emits removal event
testcase.name: auth module signOut clears stored secrets and emits removal event

testcase.classname: auth module getSessions hydrates from secrets with default label when subject missing
testcase.name: auth module getSessions hydrates from secrets with default label when subject missing

testcase.classname: auth module createSession throws cancellation error when subject or token missing
testcase.name: auth module createSession throws cancellation error when subject or token missing
